samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="REG1" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG2" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG3" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG4" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the second stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG5" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the second stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG6" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the second stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG7" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the third stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG8" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the third stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG9" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the third stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG10" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the fourth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG11" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the fourth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG12" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the fourth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG13" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the fifth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG14" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the fifth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG15" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the fifth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG16" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the sixth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG17" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the sixth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG18" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the sixth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG19" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the seventh stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG20" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the seventh stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG21" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the seventh stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG22" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the eighth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG23" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the eighth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG24" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the eighth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG25" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the ninth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG26" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the ninth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG27" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the ninth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG28" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the tenth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG29" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the tenth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG30" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the tenth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG31" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the eleventh stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG32" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the eleventh stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG33" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the eleventh stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG34" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the twelfth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG35" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the twelfth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG36" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the twelfth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG37" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the thirteenth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG38" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the thirteenth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG39" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the thirteenth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG40" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the fourth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG41" value_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the fourth stage.</parameter>
        <parameter name="REG42" value_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the fourth stage.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="REG1" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A.</reg>
            <reg id="REG2" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B.</reg>
            <reg id="REG3" type="reg" width_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry.</reg>
            <reg id="REG4" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the second stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG5" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the second stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG6" type="reg" width_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the second stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG7" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the third stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG8" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the third stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG9" type="reg" width_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the third stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG10" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the fourth stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG11" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the fourth stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG12" type="reg" width_description="[64:0]">Register to store the input carry for the fourth stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG13" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend A for the fifth stage.</reg>
            <reg id="REG14" type="reg" width_description="[63:0]">Register to store the input addend B for the fifth stage.</reg>
            <reg
